title: Soft Delete HubSpot Objects Removed During Model Refresh
description: When refreshing the HubSpot data model, if an object that was previously imported is no longer present in HubSpot, the system should soft delete the object rather than hard delete. This preserves historical data and any user-created mappings or annotations associated with that object.
acceptance_criteria: Objects removed from HubSpot are soft deleted during model refresh
Soft-deleted objects are not displayed in active views
Historical data and mappings for soft-deleted objects are preserved
Soft-deleted objects can be restored if re-added in HubSpot
middleware_changes: Model refresh logic updated to compare current HubSpot objects against stored objects and soft delete any that are no longer present.
data_model_changes: Soft delete flag on HubSpot object records (e.g., deleted_at timestamp or is_deleted boolean).
